rationale.completeness: The PR covers all three main requirements: mock operators (MockOperator class), task lifecycle simulation (TaskStateSimulator), and DAG structure validation assertions. However, it could benefit from additional utility functions like DAG comparison helpers.
rationale.correctness: Most implementation is sound, but TaskStateSimulator creates TaskInstance objects without proper run_id handling which may cause issues in real Airflow contexts. The state transition validation has some edge cases that may not be fully covered.
rationale.style: Follows Apache Airflow conventions with proper license headers, consistent docstrings, and organized module structure. Import ordering and naming conventions are consistent throughout.
rationale.quality: Code is well-organized into separate modules with clear responsibilities. Good test coverage exists. Some minor improvements possible in reducing code duplication in validators and adding more edge case handling.
